# Gondorian Fire

> [!danger] ⚔️ Attachment · Cost: **0** · Tactics

*Gondor.*

---

Attach to a **_Gondor_** or **_Dúnedain_** hero.
**Action:** Spend 1 resource from attached hero's resource pool to give attached hero +1 ATK for each resource in its resource pool until the end of the phase. (Limit once per phase.)

**Pack:** [[Assault on Osgiliath]] #85
